name: learn-anything
description: AI-assisted self-learning for senior engineers: advise-level depth, mandatory origins/evolution context, challenge-based practice, and in-repo spaced-repetition retention.

interface.shortDescription: Build and run deep, challenge-based self-learning topic repos.
interface.longDescription: A lean learning system for senior engineers who want advise-level depth, roadmap-driven study, challenge-based practice, freshness checks, and spaced-repetition retention.
defaultPrompt: Start a new learn-anything topic for Go.
Plan module 1 for my learning topic.
